rationale: The page provides a concise list of historical facts related to the Dutch presence in India and the East, including headquarters locations and key dates for battles and treaties.
cleanedText: Imp Events/Facts * Batvia - 1st HQ in the East (Indonesia) - Jakarta ; in India - Masulipatnam * Battle of Bedera (1759) * Anglo-Dutch Treaty (1824) * Chinsura (1825)
